results.rendered_html:
pitṛ—yāṇa (Ved.) and pitṛ—yāna, mfn. trodden by or leading to the P˚s (path),  RV. ;  AV. ;  ChUp. 
m. (with or scil. pathin) the path leading to the P˚s  RV. ;  AV. ;  MBh.  &c.
n. the vehicle of the P˚s, a car to convey virtuous persons after their decease to heaven,  W.
